{"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", 
"findings": [
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Lack of input validation", "recommended_fix": "Add try-except blocks for potential errors and validate user input"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Profile.js", "issue": "Unused imports", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused imports to improve code readability and performance"},
    {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/models/User.py", "issue": "Type hinting missing", "recommended_fix": "Add type hints for function parameters and return types to improve code maintainability"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/Auth.py", "issue": "Potential SQL injection vulnerability", "recommended_fix": "Use parameterized queries or an ORM to prevent SQL injection attacks"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Login.js", "issue": "Insecure password storage", "recommended_fix": "Use a secure password hashing algorithm like bcrypt or Argon2"},
    {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/utils/helpers.py", "issue": "Unused functions", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused functions to improve code readability and performance"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/users.py", "issue": "Missing authentication checks", "recommended_fix": "Add authentication checks to prevent unauthorized access"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Dashboard.js", "issue": "Incorrect data rendering", "recommended_fix": "Fix data rendering to display correct information to users"},
    {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/models/Profile.py", "issue": "Missing docstrings", "recommended_fix": "Add docstrings to improve code readability and maintainability"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/Email.py", "issue": "Potential email injection vulnerability", "recommended_fix": "Use a secure email library to prevent email injection attacks"}
], 
"overall_verdict": "warn", 
"whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.recommended_fix: Add try-except blocks for potential errors and validate user input
Remove unused imports to improve code readability and performance
Add type hints for function parameters and return types to improve code maintainability
Use parameterized queries or an ORM to prevent SQL injection attacks
Use a secure password hashing algorithm like bcrypt or Argon2
Remove unused functions to improve code readability and performance
Add authentication checks to prevent unauthorized access
Fix data rendering to display correct information to users
Add docstrings to improve code readability and maintainability
Use a secure email library to prevent email injection attacks
